# Non-terminal spec, no evidence

IN_PROGRESS is NOT terminal — the code-audit phase writes evidence without
flipping status, so absent evidence here is the normal awaiting-hand-off state →
no C8 (and no C4: IN_PROGRESS is excluded from PRE_TERMINAL_SPEC_STATUSES).
